basic_stats.Strength: Increases physical power and weight limit.
basic_stats.Intelligence: Boosts mana and magic casting speed.

hidden_stats.Dignity: Increases influence over NPCs and followers.
hidden_stats.Insight: Allows detection of hidden pieces and item details.
hidden_stats.Composure: Reduces the impact of status ailments/stress.
hidden_stats.Luck: Boosts the probability of high-tier item crafting.
